name: Arni Me Araka (Lamb with Peas)
recipeInstructions:
Cut meat into 1 1/2-inch cubes (approx.). Wash and drain. Brown butter in a pot.
Add meat and brown well. Add scallions, and cook until soft but not dark.
Add tomatoes (or diluted tomato paste), dill, parsley, salt & pepper. Simmer about 20 minutes. Add peas and an additional 1 cup water. Cover, simmer until all liquid is absorbed and only butter remains as a sauce.
